chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1822 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1.For orders on CMA 6915/24 2.For orders on CMA 6916/24 3.For hearing of main case 10-03-2025 None present for the petitioner. **** None present for the petitioner nor any intimation is received. However, from perusal of prayer clause, it reflects that petitioner is seeking appointment through ‘Deceased Quota’; the same has been declared ultra vires by the Hon’ble Supreme Court vide unreported judgment dated 18.10.2024, passed in Civil Petition No.3390 of 2021 (Re: General Post Office Islamabad & others v. Muhammad Jalal). After pronouncement of judgment by the Hon’ble Supreme Court, the Sindh Government has also omitted proviso which benefited the petitioner. Under the circumstances, this petition being not maintainable is hereby dismissed in limine along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
